Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x19FD "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Questprobe 2 - Spider-Man.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$34 sta $01 jsr $d000 lda #$37 sta $01 jsr $0a00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Questprobe 2 - Spider-Man.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0A00 to display the loading screen (the colour RAM is loaded for this to display correctly) and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Once the loading screen has been displayed, the routine then sets up the correct VICII settings for the game itself.
